name: Missouri Central Bus
fmcsa_address: 3033 W Jefferson St Suite 220, Joliet, IL 60435
registry_source: FMCSA SAFER; St. Louis Public Radio news article
notes: Name 'Missouri Central Bus' matches 'Missouri Central School Bus', a d/b/a of Illinois Central School Bus LLC (NACSB family, USDOT 1714924; HQ Joliet IL). Input address 6226 W 74th St Chicago IL 60638 actually belongs to Independence Tube/Nucor Tubular Products (a steel manufacturer, NOT a bus operator). Therefore the address in the dataset does not match any bus carrier. The USDOT 1714924 USDOT/MC numbers shown are for the parent carrier (Illinois Central School Bus LLC, d/b/a Missouri Central School Bus / Kansas Central School Bus). Missouri Central School Bus operations in St. Louis were permanently closed end of 2023-24 school year per St. Louis Public Radio (3/25/2024). FMCSA match confidence is low due to address mismatch. No standalone USDOT for 'Missouri Central Bus' was found at the Chicago address.

name: Columbia Bus Resources LLC
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record found matching 'Columbia Bus Resources' (searches against SAFER returned only 'Mid Columbia Bus Co Inc' in Pendleton OR and 'Mid Columbia Resources LLC' in Government Camp OR - neither matches name + Tualatin location). No public web presence found for Columbia Bus Resources LLC at PO Box 2413, Tualatin OR 97062. Oregon Secretary of State business registry search via egov.sos.state.or.us was inaccessible (cyber-security block). Could not confirm inc_date, officers, or entity_status from public sources. Likely a small intrastate operator without USDOT registration or a defunct/inactive entity; manual lookup at Oregon SOS Business Registry recommended.

name: Salter's Express Co Inc
carrier_operation: Interstate, authorized for hire (passenger and property)
registry_source: FMCSA SAFER; D&B; Granby-Simsbury Chamber of Commerce; Simsbury Chamber; obituary of James D. Salter (founder)
notes: Name, state and city all match input (119 West St, Simsbury, CT 06070). USDOT 17537 confirmed via SAFER; 75 power units, 59 drivers, MC-38650, Satisfactory rating (CR 08/12/2008). Active 'for hire' authority for passenger and property. School bus operations since 1960 per Chamber; corporation entry/inc date listed as 06/01/1974 (likely a census/registration date). Founder James D. Salter ran the company for 65+ years; sons James P. Salter and Mark J. Salter listed as officers. Entity is currently active.

name: Winkle Bus Co
carrier_operation: Interstate, authorized for hire; private passenger (business)/school bus
registry_source: FMCSA SAFER; winklebusco.com; Patch obituary of Chris F. Winkle III; D&B
notes: Name matches and the FMCSA carrier record is for the parent 'Winkle Bus Company Inc' headquartered at 815 Derby Milford Road, Orange CT 06477. The input dataset lists a West Haven CT address (10 Industry Dr, West Haven, CT 06516) which is the Winkle Bus Co of West Haven Inc facility - the company operates from multiple sites in Milford, Orange, and West Haven; same family ownership. Company founded/incorporated 1953 per company history (winklebusco.com). 4th-generation family business. Late President Chris F. Winkle III (d. 03/18/2018); children Laurie Winkle Grasson, Craig J. Winkle Sr. and Christian F. Winkle IV are listed survivors and current officers. Active, Satisfactory safety rating (11/17/2008). 84 power units, 69 drivers.

name: A School Ride LLC
carrier_operation: Intrastate Only (Non-HM); private passenger (business); NOT authorized for-hire interstate
notes: Name, state and address (30013 N 70th St, Scottsdale, AZ 85266) all match input. USDOT 2111754; no MC (intrastate only). Operates as private passenger business; not authorized interstate for-hire. Founded August 2009 by parents needing transportation for their daughter to BASIS Scottsdale - currently transports ~300 students to BASIS Scottsdale, BASIS Scottsdale Primary, Xavier and Brophy schools. SAFER shows 2 power units / 2 drivers as currently reported; company website materials indicate growth beyond initial single minivan. USDOT census date 01/18/2011. Officers Dale L. Eckman and Georgina A. Eckman. Arizona Corporation Commission entity-specific data (file number/formation date) not directly retrieved via web search (ecorp portal not returning data). Entity is operating/active.
